name: sba-msme-portal
description: SBA MSMEs Online Database and Reporting Portal for Liberia's Ministry of Commerce and Industry

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @sba/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @sba/api" "npm run dev --workspace @sba/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sba/shared && npm run build --workspace @sba/api && npm run build --workspace @sba/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @sba/api && npm run test --workspace @sba/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @sba/api && npm run lint --workspace @sba/web
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @sba/api && npm run format --workspace @sba/web
